message:
fix: migrate HttpClient::request calls to new asupersync Cx API

The asupersync HTTP client now requires a &Cx context parameter as the
first argument to request() and request_streaming(). Updated all callers
across 7 crates/connectors. Also added Cancelled variant to ClientError
match blocks in fcp-graphql and fcp-discord.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
